task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Autodesk Maya 2025' license with the correct metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a license list or detail page showing 'Autodesk Maya 2025' with 15 seats, Product Key 'MAYA-2025-CORP', and Purchase Cost '$12,500.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' license with the correct metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a license list or detail page showing 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' with 10 seats, Product Key 'C4D-2024-CORP', and Purchase Cost '$8,400.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify that seats of the new Maya 2025 license have been checked out to users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Autodesk Maya 2025' license showing seats as 'Checked Out' to users in the license details, seat list, or main license table.

task_completion.description: Verify the legacy Maya 2023 license is renamed to indicate it is retired and all seats are checked in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a license named 'Autodesk Maya 2023 - Retired' in the license list. It must show 0 seats checked out (or 100% of seats available).

task_completion.description: Verify that seats of the new C4D 2024 license have been checked out to users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' license showing seats as 'Checked Out' to users in the license details, seat list, or main license table.

task_completion.description: Verify the legacy C4D R25 license is renamed to indicate it is retired and all seats are checked in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a license named 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25 - Retired' in the license list. It must show 0 seats checked out (or 100% of seats available).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web GUI to create and manage the licenses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web-based asset management system (like Snipe-IT), rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually filled out the forms for creating and editing licenses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into form fields for License Name, Seats, Product Key, etc., rather than just inspecting elements or editing HTML.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real web browser navigating the asset management system, not a text editor or mock UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected new Maya license: 'Autodesk Maya 2025' (15 seats, Cost: 12500, Key: MAYA-2025-CORP). Expected new C4D license: 'Maxon Cinema 4D 2024' (10 seats, Cost: 8400, Key: C4D-2024-CORP). Expected retired Maya license name: 'Autodesk Maya 2023 - Retired'. Expected retired C4D license name: 'Maxon Cinema 4D R25 - Retired'. All retired licenses must have exactly 0 seats checked out.
